arts.ttl: Brentford and Brighton show Interest in Fiorentina’s Michael Kayode
arts.sum: Serie A club Fiorentina is open to allowing Michael Kayode to leave as both Brentford and Brighton express increasing interest in the young defender. Reports indicate that the two Premier League teams have reached out to assess Kayode's market value, with Fiorentina considering him surplus to their needs and planning to sell him next month.
